message: Node started: Identify and provide the universal De Giorgi exponent formula for dissipative PDEs characterized by diffusion order s in dimension n. Your answer must be a single formula. To ensure correctness, verify that this formula holds true for the following six specific cases: 3D Navier-Stokes, 2D Navier-Stokes, 1D Burgers, Surface Quasi-Geostrophic (SQG) equations, Magnetohydrodynamics (MHD), and fractional Navier-Stokes equations. Format your response as: FINAL_ANSWER: <formula> JUSTIFICATION: <brief verification summary>
